about.title: About Me
about.content:
• Computer Science student with experience in software development.
  • Familiar with backend techniques, proficient in various programming languages.
  • Have a strong understanding of data structures and algorithms.
  • Experience in software construction through teamwork and individually.
  • Mainly use modern web technologies for backend implementation.
  • Experience in testing and following CI/CD pipeline practices.
  • Self-motivated person with a strong commitment to growth.
  • Curious mind with an eagerness to learn.
  • Proven collaboration, attention to detail, and troubleshooting skills.
about.name: Your Name
about.summary: Computer Science student with strong backend development skills and experience in software construction.

projects.title: Personal Blog Website
projects.description:
• A modern personal website built with Next.js 15, featuring a beautiful UI with Tailwind CSS and an admin panel for content management.
  • Features include beautiful gradient background animations, glassmorphism navigation design, and fully responsive layout.
  • Admin panel for content management with local file-based storage (no database required).
  • Built with Next.js 15, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and JWT authentication.
  • Deployed on Netlify with serverless architecture support.

blog.title: Welcome to My Website!
blog.content:
Welcome to my personal website! I'm thrilled to have you here.

This website serves as a comprehensive showcase of my journey, experiences, and projects in the field of computer science. Here's what you'll find:

  • About Me: Learn more about my background, skills, and interests.
  • Experience: Explore my work experience, educational journey, and projects in a timeline format.
  • Education: Discover my academic journey and the courses I've completed.
  • Projects: Browse through my portfolio of software development projects.
  • Blog: Read my thoughts, updates, and insights on technology and programming.

Feel free to explore the different sections of this website, and don't hesitate to reach out if you'd like to connect or collaborate.

Thank you for visiting, and I hope you enjoy exploring my work!

education.title: Education
education.description: My academic journey in computer science, focusing on backend development, software engineering, and practical application of programming skills.
